AUTH_ACCOUNT_LOCKED: Account is locked, please try again later
AUTH_LOGIN_ACCOUNT_NOT_ACTIVE: Account is not active, please contact administrator
AUTH_REGISTER_PASSWORD_WEAK: Password is too weak, please use a more complex password
AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID_REFRESH: Invalid refresh token, please login again
AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID_ACCESS: Invalid access token, please login again
AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Token has expired, please login again
AUTH_RESET_TOKEN_EXPIRED: Reset token has expired, please request a new one
AUTH_RESET_TOKEN_USED: Reset token has already been used, please request a new one
VALIDATION_USERNAME_TOO_SHORT: Username must be at least 3 characters
VALIDATION_USERNAME_TOO_LONG: Username must be at most 32 characters
VALIDATION_USERNAME_INVALID_PATTERN: Username can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
VALIDATION_PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters
VALIDATION_PASSWORD_TOO_LONG: Password must be at most 64 characters
VALIDATION_PASSWORD_ALL_SAME_CHARS: Password cannot be all the same characters
INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: Internal server error, please try again later
DATABASE_ERROR: Database error, please try again later
NETWORK_ERROR: Network connection failed, please check your network
RATE_LIMIT_BLOCKED: Too many requests, your IP has been temporarily blocked
RATE_LIMIT_EXCEEDED: Too many requests, please try again later
